title: Demon Ghost
description:
This adds a new mob called: Demon Ghost
btw the file says demon zombie but that was a mistake
body:
This mod adds a new mob called the Demon Ghost. (SPOILER ALERT)
The Demon Ghost Holds Two Netherite Swords, has 20 hearts (40 health), and drops a netherite ingot upon death. It ONLY spawns in the new biome called Ghost Lands, and it spawns lightning when killed. That's all so ya'll have a nice day
